name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb422afaf250f1ebf04596d4fe404731fd36c746cfd00c7a775de7313f2b2b99b8263b18f99a2965485cf5bb42e1d07ae0

Today, President Donald J. Trump embarks on his second trip abroad. The President will make his first stop in Warsaw, Poland where he will meet with President Duda of Poland and speak with 12 Central European, Baltic, and Western Balkan leaders at a summit of the Three Seas Conference. The President will then travel to Hamburg, Germany for the G20 Summit. As the President travels abroad, he will look to promote American prosperity, protect American interests, and provide American leadership.

Today's Events

7:50 AM: President Trump departs Washington, D.C. en route to Warsaw, Poland

10:00 AM: Vice President Pence participates in a phone call with President Ashraf Ghani of Afghanistan

10:30 AM: Vice President Pence participates in a phone call with EU High Representative and Vice President Federica Mogherini

10:15 PM: President Trump arrives in Warsaw, Poland

Photo of the Day

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb1adfd8a1051775df2e342c3f4e9e4f06afa34d000149c7abede3615b3b9e1880b37d1be7569db48d04f5fa2cc29f96b0

Independence Day on the South Lawn | July 4, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY

FACT: Average premiums in Wisconsin
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafebd7675f30098d19da71061294ce716f4dcc7dd31192284eb4190690be29a5fb9a67964fba387f66ad1b261692e41cc684
have skyrocketed by $2,976 since 2013.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafebd7675f30098d19da71061294ce716f4dcc7dd31192284eb4190690be29a5fb9a67964fba387f66ad1b261692e41cc684

WHITE HOUSE UPDATES

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb4902bd161f2bfb9ad6846d7e38609993ab0b791b6c88eaadc80c976d970c4047b2f59aca6f68b7f632c145bf24663f81

President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb2a7817967b29551b52be0c28d6ecc3d30b0bf5f1beed4ce72af95a7985fe34106c61598241cc7dc0e16f64521c70064f
spoke by phone with Lt. Col. Dick Cole, the last surviving member of the famed Doolittle Raiders. The President offered his best wishes and support to the 101-year-old veteran.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb5bcdf6f04b406b3d4799f1aad4c6629158167825725c603ca3a4f161d7e95e2068d95b3d3359bae2259c9d791a9a3523

On Friday, President Trump signed the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb29454580c3c3905ac346f7d60e486dd193fd44d33f46689c252293a97ba2916718e348b05b3562f5c2bf8a9641be26db
Executive Order on Reviving the National Space Council in order to provide a coordinated process for developing and monitoring the implementation of national space policy and strategy.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafebbb8122ba0c1a1ad6e2c3b02f981e1f1252d7f036dd2105c67622f3c380e1de53a0d92f9e0a4dc9093d7e01a1d3c2d4d2

Remember All of Obamacare’s Broken Promises? There were a lot of promises made in selling Obamacare—and it seems like
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafebc649bccafb3a59be6112f1a599db25ae442512242b66863a566619bb8ccfe41fa90bb9219b12f6118ba251a9342325e1
just about all of them have been broken.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb24c737130e65d7bad902b1b7ecec226a77d029a7d4db1c5d538c85f5ca5b1643c3ae9cea80d0189f2dbae2b9bc8a62de

Intern Series:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb1a28637aa0bbf7220783ba6b371b3b7c4f9de25b9bf8f131cff2322c48584de76b6a83ccb2c8335479a030e7db276f3d
South Carolina to the South Lawn, "As I was watching the 2017 College Football Playoff National Championship game on a cold January day at home in Kentucky, I never imagined that in a few short months I would be on the South Lawn of the White House..."

West Wing Reads

Each day we put together a list of the top news stories the West Wing is reading and share them with you.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb4927bdbd4a50c58e4273dd791857e50772945cf811324f4d01084422f2674897b09b21c48485406d04e97b88b95e1875
Sign up to receive this daily update from the West Wing.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafeb4927bdbd4a50c58e4273dd791857e50772945cf811324f4d01084422f2674897b09b21c48485406d04e97b88b95e1875

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafebaab7a8380f1086a897ceb02a56ec238dfe9ea17a5066ff23e91a7cfb110557f419e35c7c63872ccf1f31a053960ac4fa
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=18ee13b2e3daafebc26e6dde680642fecfa6addbd306ad30891c743741686bb3d3321b24cd9391c1d68f242745f496fc19cb3b33a59c8ae4
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d489b1c5977c11cb279f77e8cfa26f484bd591ba95a518e70a82d1d1ed43c1233b025b0a637be8c543d21b664de666fc2a
Unsubscribe

The President will make his first stop in Warsaw, Poland where he will meet with President Duda of Poland and speak with 12 Central European, Baltic, and Western Balkan leaders at a summit of the Three Seas Conference. The President will then travel to Hamburg, Germany for the G20 Summit. As the President travels abroad, he will look to promote American prosperity, protect American interests, and provide American leadership. Today's Events 7:50 AM: President Trump departs Washington, D.C. en route to Warsaw, Poland 10:00 AM: Vice President Pence participates in a phone call with President Ashraf Ghani of Afghanistan 10:30 AM: Vice President Pence participates in a phone call with EU High Representative and Vice President Federica Mogherini 10:15 PM: President Trump arrives in Warsaw, Poland Photo of the Day Independence Day on the South Lawn | July 4, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks) OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY FACT: Average premiums in Wisconsin have skyrocketed by $2,976 since 2013. WHITE HOUSE UPDATES President Trump spoke by phone with Lt. Col. Dick Cole, the last surviving member of the famed Doolittle Raiders. The President offered his best wishes and support to the 101-year-old veteran. Remember All of Obamacare’s Broken Promises? There were a lot of promises made in selling Obamacare—and it seems like just about all of them have been broken. Intern Series: South Carolina to the South Lawn, "As I was watching the 2017 College Football Playoff National Championship game on a cold January day at home in Kentucky, I never imagined that in a few short months I would be on the South Lawn of the White House..." name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Did you miss it?
body:
Most Important Speech Yet for the Faith Community

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

Did you miss the fireworks? Americans spent
$7 billion celebrating our Independence yesterday…that's a
lot of food and fireworks! But we certainly have reason to
celebrate. Ours is the freest and most prosperous nation in the
history of the world.

Why? What's different about the United States
than any other nation?

Simple…our nation was uniquely
established on the principles of our faith and recognition of
God. Our country was established recognizing the vital role
religion plays in the flourishing of its people.

We also have a president who recognizes the
role of religion in our nation.

This past Saturday, at the Celebrate Freedom
Concert, President Trump delivered what has become his most
important speech yet for the faith community. In recent memory, I
cannot think of another president speaking with so much
conviction and honesty about religious freedom in America.
Christians are extremely fortunate to have a president that
believes, without excuse or apology, that America is at her
greatest when she recognizes her Creator.

He reminded us that "as long as our country
remains true to its values, loyal to its heroes, and devoted to
its Creator, then our best days are yet to come."

To be clear, our best days are where
religious liberty abounds and the gospel flourishes. Our best
days are when we overcome oppression, the strong protects the
weak, and good defeats evil. Our best days are when God is truly
honored in America.

That is the vision of My Faith Votes, that
God will be honored in America. And it's why we fight every day
for the values of our faith to shape the future of our nation. It
is why we care so much about elections because they matter.

As we celebrate American freedom this week,
I'm thankful for the many countless blessings we enjoy in
America, but I'm especially thankful we still live in a place
where God is recognized and honored - beginning with the
president of the United States.

Faith makes America stronger,

Jason Yates
CEO
My Faith Votes

My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement
focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in
local and national elections and be active members of society. By
partnering with local churches, pastors and national faith
leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead
the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWzRqKQEKN

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523233/4067b0a/36c14baf8/7e6a15f3/2613830203/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170705_dnc_v2s2&source=em_20170705_dnc_v2s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523233/4067b0a/36c14baf8/7e6a15f0/2613830203/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170705_dnc_v2s2&source=em_20170705_dnc_v2s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523233/4067b0a/36c14baf8/7e6a15f1/2613830203/VEsO/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170705_dnc_v2s2&source=em_20170705_dnc_v2s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523233/4067b0a/36c14baf8/7e6a15fe/2613830203/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170705_dnc_v2s2&source=em_20170705_dnc_v2s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: it's all because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26da/7377f838/36cd2e5c/51fb0bae/3958674631/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

I just want to take a second to thank you and all the people who stand with me to support this campaign. It's because of people like you that I won my first campaign for the Senate and it's your support that will send me back for another term.

I'm proud to represent Hoosiers in the Senate -- especially at a time when we face fights over catastrophic health care bills, cuts to crucial education funding, and unprecedented attacks on Indiana's working families. **As your Senator, I 'll never stop working to improve the lives of Hoosiers and will always stand up for you in Washington.**

Thank you again,

Joe

P.S. **[Let's keep the momentum going -- pitch in to help us start off the next fundraising quarter strong!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26da/7377f838/36cd2e5c/51fb0ba9/3958674631/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-julykickoff?refcode=20170705&amount=25")** **** **** **** **** | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26da/7377f838/36cd2e5c/51fb0ba9/3958674631/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-julykickoff?refcode=20170705&amount=25")
---
**** ****
**** ****

|

name: Team DSCC
subject: We need your vote on this tote, team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Cast your vote for our official DSCC tote bag, team!
---
**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e49e/2b07114c/38499221/7311b8bd/3102385191/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/2017ToteVote?source=PT-20170705-TeamDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")**
We have a decision to make, team -- and we want your input! Which of these designs should be our 2017 Official DSCC Tote Bag?

[**Cast your vote for our official DSCC tote bag -- then make sure you 're one of the first to get the winning design!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e49e/2b07114c/38499221/7311b8bd/3102385191/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/2017ToteVote?source=PT-20170705-TeamDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e49e/2b07114c/38499221/7311b8bd/3102385191/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/2017ToteVote?source=PT-20170705-TeamDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")
And after you vote, if you make a contribution of $35 or more, we'll send you the winning design for free (_including_ shipping)!

Any of these designs would be a great way to say you're a proud Democrat, but only one can be our official DSCC tote bag

We're looking forward to seeing which design you pick! [**Vote here >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e49e/2b07114c/38499221/7311b8bd/3102385191/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/2017ToteVote?source=PT-20170705-TeamDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e49e/2b07114c/38499221/7311b8bd/3102385191/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/2017ToteVote?source=PT-20170705-TeamDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

**A quick note on donations, team:**

When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner -- but we have you. And every gift you give the DSCC is a gift we use to propel our Senate candidates to victory.

Please consider contributing today. Many of our Senate champions are up for reelection in 2018 and we know that the Koch brothers and special interests will make it incredibly tough to ensure they can keep fighting for us in the Senate without your support.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170705-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e49e/2b07114c/38499221/7311b8bf/3102385191/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e49e/2b07114c/38499221/7311b8be/3102385191/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e49e/2b07114c/38499221/7311b8b9/3102385191/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

"=" "=" And after you vote, if you make a contribution of $35 or more, we'll send you the winning design for free (including shipping)! Any of these designs would be a great way to say you're a proud Democrat, but only one can be our official DSCC tote bag We're looking forward to seeing which design you pick! "=" Thank you, Team DSCC "=" A quick note on donations, team: When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner -- but we have you. And every gift you give the DSCC is a gift we use to propel our Senate candidates to victory. Please consider contributing today. Many of our Senate champions are up for reelection in 2018 and we know that the Koch brothers and special interests will make it incredibly tough to ensure they can keep fighting for us in the Senate without your support. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, "". If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
